title: Critique
description: Adversarial fact-checker output for the verify node (reflect-then-revise critic). approved=true breaks the revise loop early; otherwise issues drives the reviser. Matches the inlined S.critique table in workflow.js.

approved.description: True when every claim is adequately source-backed; the verify loop breaks early on true.

issues.description: Problems found per claim. May be empty when approved=true.

claim_id.description: The findings claim.id this issue targets.

problem.description: What is wrong: unsupported, overstated, miscited, etc.
